import threading
import asyncio

_request_ctx = threading.local()

def set_request_id(request_id: str):
    _request_ctx.request_id = request_id

async def get_current_user():
    request_id = _request_ctx.request_id
    user = await fetch_user_by_request(request_id)
    return user

async def fetch_user_by_request(request_id: str) -> dict:
    return {"id": "U1", "request": request_id}

async def log_request():
    request_id = _request_ctx.request_id
    print(f"Processing request {request_id}")

async def handle_response(data: dict) -> dict:
    ctx = _request_ctx
    return {
        "request_id": ctx.request_id,
        "data": data,
    }
